Class Modality

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.Modality
All Implemented Interfaces:
Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
JModality
public abstract class Modality extends AbstractSortedOperator
This class is used to represent a dynamic logic modality like diamond and box for a target language.
